name: receiving_report_number_present
expression: receiving_report_number IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(receiving_report_number)) > 0
description: receiving_report_number is required for Receiving Report extraction.

name: receipt_date_present
expression: receipt_date IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(receipt_date)) > 0
description: receipt_date is required for Receiving Report extraction.

name: purchase_order_number_present
expression: purchase_order_number IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(purchase_order_number)) > 0
description: purchase_order_number is required for Receiving Report extraction.

name: supplier_name_present
expression: supplier_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(supplier_name)) > 0
description: supplier_name is required for Receiving Report extraction.

name: line_items_received_present
expression: line_items_received IS NOT NULL AND JSON_ARRAY_LENGTH(line_items_received) > 0
description: line_items_received is required for Receiving Report extraction.
